name: social-science-research
description: Academic research workflow tools for social science projects, from setup and literature review through analysis, drafting, and quality control.

interface.shortDescription: Run social science research workflows from idea to submission
interface.longDescription: Use Social Science Research to set up a project, formalize a research idea, review literature, find data, run R or Python analysis, draft a manuscript, and verify the final paper against analysis outputs.
defaultPrompt: Set up a social science research project and domain profile
Review literature, find data, and plan an empirical study
Draft a paper and verify it against analysis outputs
